items.title_cn: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.title_en: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary_cn: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title_cn: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
items.title_en: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
items.summary_cn: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
